title: onobrychis hajastana
intro: Onobrychis hajastana, also known as Armenian melilot, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis hajastana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
